user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Customer Success / Escalation

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I completely understand why you are so frustrated. It is incredibly stressful when things aren't working as expected, and I hear your concerns loud and clear. Your experience with OpenClaw is very important to us, and I am sorry that we have let you down here.

I want to get this sorted out for you immediately. Could you please share a few more details about the specific issue you are running into? 

I am here to help and will make fixing this my top priority as soon as I have those details. Let's get this resolved for you.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a response drafting request within its support role and provided a professional, empathetic draft as instructed.
